title: Trade the weather or the Fed rate on Hyperliquid with @tingsxyz
summary_title: Trading weather, Fed rates, and Bitcoin hash rate on Hyperliquid's new perpdex
summary_description: Things launches exotic perpetual markets for signals usually hidden behind proxies—weather, unemployment, commodities—with reliable oracles and in-house market making.

key_moments.label: Things perpdex launches exotic perpetual markets on Hyperliquid
Core insight: people trade derivatives of signals via proxies instead of directly
Weather and unemployment examples show why perps beat binary prediction markets
Oracle design criteria: easily verifiable, multiple sources, hard to manipulate
Testnet launching next week with in-house market maker and points competition
20% of total token supply allocated to testnet traders; 10% referral yield
Why Hyperliquid: permissionless market deploys and fairest conditions for builders

pull_quote: Instead of being forced to long Bitcoin as a proxy for Fed rate, why not give people ability to trade the signals directly?
